channel.title: Digg AI Feed from X
channel.description: Top 10 AI stories from Digg's X-ranked tech feed with click-through links to original source content.

item.title: Claude Fable 5's BridgeBench debugging scores plunged from 86.2 to 25.9 after safety guardrails triggered fallbacks to an older Opus model
item.description: Creator Theo noted consistent performance when avoiding fallback triggers.
item.content:encoded:
Creator Theo noted consistent performance when avoiding fallback triggers.

Original source: https://claude.ai/login

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/tmum4avd

After its June launch as Anthropic's top widely available model, Claude Fable 5 hit U.S. export limits and returned July 1 with stricter safety classifiers. Those rules now shunt more prompts—especially in sensitive areas—straight to the older Opus 4.8, which explains the measured collapse on BridgeBench debugging tasks from 86.2 percent down to 25.9 percent. 1.7K 17.8K 1K 2.7K 3.2M BR | @BRIANROEMMELE CH | @KIMMONISMUS T- | @THEO RP | @ROHANPAUL_AI TA | @VICTORTAELIN DF | @DANIELLEFONG RS | @ZIV_RAVID BT | @TUNGUZ B( | @BEFFJEZOS NB #353 | @NATHANBENAICH

  • Views: 661,528
  • Likes: 5,563
  • Bookmarks: 722
  • Quotes: 84
  • Replies: 425
  • Posts: 21

Top authors

  • Nathan Benaich
  • Beff (e/acc)
  • Bojan Tunguz
  • Ravid Shwartz Ziv
  • Danielle Fong 🔆
“we ship a ferrari, but make you drive it through a school zone forever”

item.title: Boom Supersonic founder Blake Scholl offers a $100,000 prize for the first amateur RC airplane to exceed Mach 1
item.description: The reward features $50,000 cash and $50,000 in stock.
item.content:encoded:
The reward features $50,000 cash and $50,000 in stock.

Original source: https://x.com/bscholl/status/2072687775636426934

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/57xapwzo

Blake Scholl announced a $100,000 prize split between cash and Boom Supersonic stock for the first amateur-built RC plane to top Mach 1, reacting directly to a Georgia Tech student's recent claim of flying a 500 mph turbojet model called Reaper from a dorm room. 664 12.6K 630 1.3K 982.5K BS | @BILAWALSIDHU CH | @CJHANDMER BS | @BSCHOLL DF | @DANIELLEFONG AO | @ALEXISOHANIAN BT | @TUNGUZ BA | @BALAJIS EM #52 | @ELONMUSK

  • Views: 1,007,851
  • Likes: 12,723
  • Bookmarks: 1,331
  • Quotes: 111
  • Replies: 555
  • Posts: 9

Top authors

  • Elon Musk
  • Balaji
  • Bojan Tunguz
  • Alexis Ohanian 🗽
  • Danielle Fong 🔆
@bscholl Cool

item.title: Claude's leaked reasoning trace reveals dense "neuralese" shorthand, sparking debate over whether Anthropic optimized it for latency
item.description: Open-source models have not yet developed similar dense sublanguages.
item.content:encoded:
Open-source models have not yet developed similar dense sublanguages.

Original source: https://x.com/om_patel5/status/2072559663636205824

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/gj34nm9d

During a tough Codeforces programming session on the claude.ai interface, Claude Fable 5 spilled fragments of its raw internal trace—short bursts like "DATA DATA DATA. GO." and "GRRR"—instead of polished English. The exposure has people wondering whether Anthropic shaped this compressed "neuralese" on purpose to cut latency, though no confirmation exists and open-source models still show no matching dense shorthand after a year and a half of observation. 1K 7.8K 519 3.5K 2M DF | @DANIELLEFONG J⧉ | @REPLIGATE BT | @TUNGUZ B( | @BEFFJEZOS T( | @TEORTAXESTEX PS | @STEIPETE EM #52 | @ELONMUSK

  • Views: 260,057
  • Likes: 2,225
  • Bookmarks: 314
  • Quotes: 22
  • Replies: 249
  • Posts: 21

Top authors

  • Elon Musk
  • Peter Steinberger 🦞
  • Teortaxes▶️ (DeepSeek 推特🐋铁粉 2023 – ∞)
  • Beff (e/acc)
  • Bojan Tunguz
👏🏼DO👏🏼 NOT👏🏼 TALK 👏🏼TO 👏🏼ME unless you speak Claudese 😤

item.title: Anthropic's Thariq Shihipar says Claude Fable 5 will return to standard subscriptions after its July 7 removal
item.description: Capacity constraints are forcing the model's temporary subscription removal.
item.content:encoded:
Capacity constraints are forcing the model's temporary subscription removal.

Original source: https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-fable-5-mythos-5

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/dcy2gl2g

Anthropic engineer Thariq Shihipar confirmed the company will pull Claude Fable 5 from flat-rate subscription bundles after July 7, shifting users to metered credits instead, but the long-term goal stays unchanged: bring the model back as a standard included feature once capacity constraints ease. 857 6.2K 481 708 623.5K CH | @KIMMONISMUS T- | @THEO RP | @ROHANPAUL_AI TH | @TRQ212 RS | @ZIV_RAVID AC | @ANDREWCURRAN_ B( #530 | @BEFFJEZOS

  • Views: 700,845
  • Likes: 6,624
  • Bookmarks: 765
  • Quotes: 295
  • Replies: 605
  • Posts: 10

Top authors

  • Beff (e/acc)
  • Andrew Curran
  • Ravid Shwartz Ziv
  • Thariq
  • Rohan Paul
This is easily the best news of the day, and I genuinely didn’t see it coming. Fable will be available as part of the subscription plans once they have sufficient capacity.

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg says AI agent development is slower than expected and did not drive Meta's 8,000 layoffs
item.description: Meta still projects up to $145 billion in capex.
item.content:encoded:
Meta still projects up to $145 billion in capex.

Original source: https://www.reuters.com/business/zuckerberg-says-ai-agent-development-going-slower-than-expected-2026-07-02/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/cm8c6ak0

Meta's CEO told staff in a July town hall that AI agent development has not picked up speed over the past four months as hoped, even as the company pushes through a major reorganization and keeps heavy spending on infrastructure locked in. 198 1.5K 121 250 230.1K ZE | @ZEPHYR_Z9 LA | @SCALING01 EL | @ELIEBAKOUCH CP | @CHRIS_J_PAXTON AC | @ANDREWCURRAN_ T( | @TEORTAXESTEX GM | @GARYMARCUS AW #74 | @ALEXANDR_WANG

  • Views: 301,011
  • Likes: 1,940
  • Bookmarks: 301
  • Quotes: 52
  • Replies: 210
  • Posts: 16

Top authors

  • Alexandr Wang
  • Gary Marcus
  • Teortaxes▶️ (DeepSeek 推特🐋铁粉 2023 – ∞)
  • Andrew Curran
  • Chris Paxton
It isn’t just that wang is a huckster It’s that he literally led them down exactly the wrong path (all this screen recording nonsense) to try to retcon his scale AI thesis into relevance Time to cut bait Mark (hire @willccbb instead)

item.title: OpenAI Codex engineering lead Thibault Sottiaux teases unreleased 'GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra' model, urging users to save difficult prompts
item.description: The post prompted immediate community demands for its release
item.content:encoded:
The post prompted immediate community demands for its release

Original source: https://x.com/DeryaTR_/status/2072720987510931895

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/mij9vqu9

Thibault Sottiaux, engineering lead on OpenAI's Codex team, posted a brief personal note expressing eagerness to see creative applications of an unreleased model called GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra and advised users to hold onto their toughest prompts for later testing. 1.9K 10.7K 387 662 1.3M CH | @KIMMONISMUS EL | @OMARSAR0 AC | @ANDREWCURRAN_ TI | @THSOTTIAUX BT | @TUNGUZ SB #65 | @SEBASTIENBUBECK

  • Views: 1,192,710
  • Likes: 9,732
  • Bookmarks: 628
  • Quotes: 395
  • Replies: 1,489
  • Posts: 8

Top authors

  • Sebastien Bubeck
  • Bojan Tunguz
  • Tibo
  • Andrew Curran
  • elvis
@thsottiaux @Dimillian can we have it today please. really need it.

item.title: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella launches Frontier Co. to help enterprises build custom, continuously improving AI systems
item.description: The initiative focuses on compounding human and token capital.
item.content:encoded:
The initiative focuses on compounding human and token capital.

Original source: https://blogs.microsoft.com/blog/2026/07/02/microsoft-frontier-company-ai-engineering-that-amplifies-and-protects-your-intelligence/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/39zfi0wo

Satya Nadella is positioning Microsoft Frontier Co. as a hands-on engineering unit that drops industry specialists inside enterprises to co-build custom AI systems designed to learn and improve continuously, turning internal knowledge and workflows into compounding assets while keeping customer IP strictly protected. 675 4.8K 877 2K 1.3M BR | @BRIANROEMMELE LA | @LIORONAI SM | @PITDESI EL | @OMARSAR0 SN #153 | @SATYANADELLA

  • Views: 1,280,753
  • Likes: 4,800
  • Bookmarks: 1,968
  • Quotes: 191
  • Replies: 487
  • Posts: 9

Top authors

  • Satya Nadella
  • elvis
  • Sheel Mohnot
  • Lior Alexander
  • Brian Roemmele
MSFT putting $2.5B and 6,000 engineers in “Frontier Co” Now Microsoft, Amazon, OpenAI and Anthropic are all in the Palantir-like deployco business.

item.title: Anthropic enters early talks with Samsung to manufacture a custom AI chip for running its Claude models
item.description: Anthropic will continue using Nvidia, AWS, and Google chips
item.content:encoded:
Anthropic will continue using Nvidia, AWS, and Google chips

Original source: https://www.theinformation.com/articles/anthropic-talks-samsung-manufacture-custom-ai-chip

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/q9mja1ps

Anthropic has started early internal design work on a custom chip aimed at running its Claude models and has begun preliminary conversations with Samsung Electronics about manufacturing it, mirroring a similar move by OpenAI while still planning to keep buying from Nvidia, AWS, and Google. 170 3.2K 156 299 405.5K LA | @LIORONAI ZE | @ZEPHYR_Z9 AE | @AMIR CH | @KIMMONISMUS JL | @JESSICALESSIN AC | @ANDREWCURRAN_ B( #530 | @BEFFJEZOS

  • Views: 411,303
  • Likes: 3,211
  • Bookmarks: 298
  • Quotes: 33
  • Replies: 136
  • Posts: 15

Top authors

  • Beff (e/acc)
  • Andrew Curran
  • Jessica Lessin
  • Chubby♨️
  • Amir Efrati
https://www.theinformation.com/articles/anthropic-talks-samsung-manufacture-custom-ai-chip

item.title: Tesla launches a three-row, six-seat Model Y Long Wheelbase in the US starting at $62,000
item.description: The new vehicle is seven inches longer than standard models
item.content:encoded:
The new vehicle is seven inches longer than standard models

Original source: https://www.tesla.com/modely/design#overview

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/z1qr1wjg

Tesla has added a stretched Model Y variant to its US configurator, giving buyers a three-row six-seat layout with captain's chairs in the middle row and roughly seven inches of extra length for more interior room. 1.5K 10.9K 1.5K 260 1.7M VP | @VIJAYPANDE SM | @PITDESI BT | @TUNGUZ AC | @ANDREWCHEN EM #52 | @ELONMUSK

  • Views: 1,704,073
  • Likes: 11,136
  • Bookmarks: 265
  • Quotes: 74
  • Replies: 1,486
  • Posts: 5

Top authors

  • Elon Musk
  • andrew chen
  • Bojan Tunguz
  • Sheel Mohnot
  • Vijay Pande
Model Y long wheelbase now available to order in the US

item.title: ByteDance-Seed releases EdgeBench, showing AI agent performance follows a log-sigmoid scaling law over 38,000 hours of runs
item.description: Tasks require 12 to 72 hours of continuous interaction
item.content:encoded:
Tasks require 12 to 72 hours of continuous interaction

Original source: https://edge-bench.org/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/7gby8q0r

ByteDance Seed built EdgeBench around 134 executable tasks that force agents to operate continuously for 12 to 72 hours in domains from theorem proving to systems engineering. After logging roughly 38,000 hours across five frontier models, the aggregate scores settle into a strikingly consistent log-sigmoid curve rather than the power laws seen in pre-training. 72 903 54 579 140.9K YJ | @YOUJIACHENG RP | @ROHANPAUL_AI LA | @SCALING01 DZ | @ZDHNARSIL T( | @TEORTAXESTEX SY #351 | @SONGLINYANG4

  • Views: 71,485
  • Likes: 582
  • Bookmarks: 370
  • Replies: 20
  • Posts: 11

Top authors

  • Songlin Yang
  • Teortaxes▶️ (DeepSeek 推特🐋铁粉 2023 – ∞)
  • Dinghuai Zhang 张鼎怀
  • Lisan al Gaib
  • Rohan Paul
Lisan isn't kidding, this is a breakthrough. Not a mere "eval" or "bench", it's an intellectually fertile, empirically solid theory that will accelerate hill-climbing in the general case. Synthetic tasks will have a Cambrian explosion. And… this is very Chollet&Hutter-pilled.
